message:
refactor(stream): simplify receiver stream poll_next match arms

Combine redundant match arms in ReceiverStream::poll_next - both
RecvError::Empty and Poll::Pending result in Poll::Pending, so they
can be merged into a single pattern.

Also mark cx_send as unused in the test since it's only needed to
create the channel, not for subsequent operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
